_comment_: Spaarke Insights Engine derived index per SPEC §3.4. Holds Observations and Precedents differentiated by artifactType discriminator. Single index pattern per D-53 (revised). Designed for vectorFilterMode=preFilter retrieval (D-33) over tenant + artifactType + predicate + scope. NOTE: this _comment_ key is stripped by the canonicalizer before deployment (Azure Search rejects unknown properties on IndexDefinition).
name: spaarke-insights-index

fields.// override-sortable-facetable: key field: Azure forbids sortable/facetable on the key
fields.name: id

fields.// complex-parent: ComplexType parent: flags apply to inner scalar leaves, not the container
fields.name: value

fields.// complex-parent: ComplexType parent: flags apply to inner scalar leaves, not the container
fields.name: raw

fields.// complex-parent: ComplexType parent: flags apply to inner scalar leaves, not the container
fields.name: scope

fields.// override-filter-sort-facet: displayHint is presentation metadata: not meaningful to filter/sort/facet; retrievable for client-side parsing
fields.name: displayHint

fields.// override-filter-sort-facet: opaque JSON value blob — not meaningful to filter/sort/facet; retrievable for client-side parsing
fields.name: valueJson

fields.// override-facetable: Edm.Double confidence is a continuous numeric (high cardinality) — faceting not useful
fields.name: confidence

fields.// complex-parent: Collection(Edm.ComplexType) parent: flags apply to inner scalar leaves, not the container
fields.name: evidence

fields.// override-sortable-facetable: Azure forbids sortable/facetable on fields inside Collection(Edm.ComplexType) parents (multi-valued)
fields.name: refType

fields.// override-sortable-facetable: ref is a high-cardinality identifier (per-evidence opaque); sortable/facetable not useful
fields.name: ref

fields.// searchable=true: long-form quote text used for full-text query; sortable/facetable=false: long-text fields cannot be sort/facet keys
fields.name: quote

fields.// override-facetable: datetime faceting is rarely useful (per catalog policy table)
fields.name: asOf

fields.// searchable=true: long-form content text used for full-text query; sortable/facetable=false: long-text fields cannot be sort/facet keys
fields.name: content

fields.// vector-field: 3072-dim HNSW cosine; retrievable=false (vector payload is heavy, excluded from $select); stored=true retains for reranking; searchable=true enables vector search
fields.name: contentVector

fields._comment_: Wave D6 (task 035) — top-level scope ComplexType for multi-entity subjects per design-a6 §4. Hybrid backward-compat: scope.matterId is kept for Phase 1 matter-subject queries (NFR-08); scope.entityType + scope.entityId are the canonical generalized fields for matter, project, invoice, and future schemes. Reader dual-read filter (design-a6 §4.5): for matter subjects, OR-filter scope/matterId OR (scope/entityType eq 'matter' and scope/entityId eq ...). All three fields are filterable strings; nullable (Phase 1 Observations omit them entirely and remain queryable via tenantId + subject).
fields.// complex-parent: ComplexType parent: flags apply to inner scalar leaves, not the container
fields.name: scope

fields.// override-facetable: entityId is a high-cardinality opaque identifier — faceting not useful
fields.name: entityId
